segments.text: O foolish Galatians, who hath bewitched you, that ye should not obey the truth, before whose eyes Jesus Christ hath been evidently set forth, crucified among you?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: This only would I learn of you, Received ye the Spirit by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Are ye so foolish? having begun in the Spirit, are ye now made perfect by the flesh?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Have ye suffered so many things in vain? if it be yet in vain.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: He therefore that ministereth to you the Spirit, and worketh miracles among you, doeth he it by the works of the law, or by the hearing of faith?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Even as Abraham believed God,
and it was accounted to him for righteousness.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Know ye therefore that they which are of faith, the same are the children of Abraham.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And the scripture, foreseeing that God would justify the heathen through faith, preached before the gospel unto Abraham,
In thee shall all nations be blessed.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So then they which be of faith are blessed with faithful Abraham.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For as many as are of the works of the law are under the curse: for it is written, Cursed is every one that continueth not in all things which are written in the book of the law to do them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But that no man is justified by the law in the sight of God, it is evident: for, The just shall live by faith.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And the law is not of faith: but, The man that doeth them shall live in them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Christ hath redeemed us from the curse of the law, being made a curse for us: for it is written, Cursed is every one that hangeth on a tree:
segments.speaker: Christ

segments.text: That the blessing of Abraham might come on the Gentiles through Jesus Christ; that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Brethren, I speak after the manner of men; Though it be but a man's covenant, yet if it be confirmed, no man disannulleth, or addeth thereto.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Now to Abraham and his seed were the promises made. He saith not, And to seeds, as of many; but as of one, And to thy seed, which is Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And this I say, that the covenant, that was confirmed before of God in Christ, the law, which was four hundred and thirty years after, cannot disannul, that it should make the promise of none effect.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For if the inheritance be of the law, it is no more of promise: but God gave it to Abraham by promise.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Wherefore then serveth the law? It was added because of transgressions, till the seed should come to whom the promise was made; and it was ordained by angels in the hand of a mediator.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Now a mediator is not a mediator of one, but God is one.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Is the law then against the promises of God? God forbid: for if there had been a law given which could have given life, verily righteousness should have been by the law.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But the scripture hath concluded all under sin, that the promise by faith of Jesus Christ might be given to them that believe.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But before faith came, we were kept under the law, shut up unto the faith which should afterwards be revealed.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Wherefore the law was our schoolmaster to bring us unto Christ, that we might be justified by faith.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But after that faith is come, we are no longer under a schoolmaster.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For ye are all the children of God by faith in Christ Jesus.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For as many of you as have been baptized into Christ have put on Christ.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: There is neither Jew nor Greek, there is neither bond nor free, there is neither male nor female: for ye are all one in Christ Jesus.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And if ye be Christ's, then are ye Abraham's seed, and heirs according to the promise.
segments.speaker: Paul
